caption: A man with a beard, wearing a brown jacket over a light-colored shirt, speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" while standing outdoors against a blurred backdrop of trees and a building. The scene is overlaid with news graphics including the logo for "NEWS 18" and various headshots of political figures. Across the top of the frames, red banners display the text "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". Other text boxes identify people as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री", and "डिप्टी CM". The lower third of the screen features a red ticker; it initially reads "नीतीश कुमार: BJP के साथ पहले भी थे" and later changes to "नीतीश कुमार: हम जहाँ थे फिर वहीं आ गए". The time stamp in the corner progresses from "10:04 PM" to "10:05 PM". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gesturing with his hands as he speaks.
